---
title: "Dorothea Mary Stanislaus Gerard"
---

## Dorothea Mary Stanislaus Gerard

**Dates:** (1855-1915)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1893-98)

### Biography

She married (1886) Julius Longard de Longgarde.  She was a prolific novelist, sometimes with her sister Emily, who lived in Galicia in the Austrian Empire.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
